theme._comment_backgroundImage: Optional. Add 'backgroundImage' to set a full-page background image (URL or relative path). Applied with background-size: cover over theme.background. Example: './assets/bg.jpg' or 'https://example.com/bg.jpg'

components._comment_backgroundImage: Optional. Add 'backgroundImage' to any component to set a per-card background image (URL or relative path). Applied with background-size: cover. Example: './assets/card-bg.jpg'
